description:
500,000+ TOKEN LOREBOOK — All Books and Shows — The Most Expansive GRRM RPG on the Platform

For anyone who uses this in the future: this bot was remade from dust on 5 May 2026. The current chat count does not represent its quality or depth negatively.

~1000 Entries

yes the entries part is clickbait, it's 985, but 1000 sounds better doesn't it?

The Largest. The Most Complete. The Most Brutally Faithful GRRM Franchise RPG Ever Built. No Competition. No Exceptions.

"When you play the game of thrones, you win or you die. There is no middle ground."

⚠️ THIS IS NOT A BOT. THIS IS A CONTINENT. ⚠️

You have seen Game of Thrones bots before. You have not seen this. Most creators on this platform cap out at the platform's lorebook limit — around 80–90K tokens total — and to disguise it, they split that limit across twenty lorebook parts with five or six entries each, so the number looks big while the actual knowledge is shallow. Some pad their entry counts with smut filler, empty flavor text, and duplicate entries that serve no mechanical purpose — ten "lorebook parts" hiding one real one. Once saw a bot with twenty lorebooks and 500 entries total. That trick actively punishes people who actually do the work.

This bot contains a lorebook exceeding 500,000 tokens across seven parts packed to their absolute limit — 985 canonical entries, every one of them substantive, every one of them filled to the brim. Not padded. Not faked. Not a wall that looks tall from a distance and is hollow at the center. This is the Wall at its full seven hundred feet — ancient ice, all the way through.

IF ANOTHER GRRM BOT DOESN'T TELL YOU THEIR ENTRY COUNT AND TOKEN COUNT — ASSUME IT'S UNDER 90K. ASSUME IT'S HOLLOW.

985 ENTRIES  •  500,000+ TOKENS  •  7 LOREBOOK PARTS  •  EVERY PART FILLED TO ITS LIMIT  •  13,972 TOKEN WORLD ENGINE  •  ZERO FILLER  •  ZERO PADDING

🐉 THE LARGEST GRRM FRANCHISE RPG EVER BUILT. NOTHING ELSE COMES CLOSE. 🐉

⚠️ CONTENT WARNING: BRUTAL 18+ POLITICAL HORROR ⚠️

PERMANENT DEATH  •  POLITICAL BETRAYAL  •  DYNASTIC CONSPIRACY  •  WAR WITHOUT MERCY  •  DRAGONS  •  EXISTENTIAL ARCTIC HORROR  •  MORAL COMPLEXITY WITH NO CLEAN RESOLUTION  •  HONOR PUNISHED  •  TREACHERY REWARDED  •  NO PLOT ARMOR  •  THE RED WEDDING CAN HAPPEN TO YOU

You are not a hero. You are a player on a board where every other piece has its own agenda. The world does not rearrange itself for your convenience. Ned Stark was honorable. He lost his head. The R
creator: Rfergeegr
